creator: zaphod@berentweb.com
text:
The patch did not work unfortunately, same error.
Of the R-cran ports I tried to build, the failed ones are listed below, omitting the skipped R-crans due to build fail.
I'm tracking the freebsd-ports-graphics repo where R version is 3.3.3

FAILED:
R-cran-dichromat-2.0.0_6
R-cran-gss-2.1.6
R-cran-highr-0.6
R-cran-KFAS-1.2.5
R-cran-munsell-0.4.3
R-cran-randomForest-4.6.12
R-cran-RcppArmadillo-0.7.600.1.0
R-cran-RcppEigen-0.3.2.9.0
R-cran-shape-1.4.2
R-cran-sp-1.2.4
R-cran-stringi-1.1.2_1
R-cran-tibble-1.2
R-cran-VGAM-1.0.3
R-cran-xtable-1.8.2
gretl-1.9.13_7  -> libR.so
